product_goal: 开发一个聊天页面 — a modern, responsive chat page with real-time messaging, AI streaming responses, and threaded conversations.

in_scope: Infinite scroll history with virtualized list
AI streaming responses via SSE with markdown rendering
Message search (client-side for demo; API contract for server-side)
out_of_scope: File upload / media storage (UI stub only)
OAuth / SSO integration (basic session auth only)

user_stories.story: As a user, I want to send and receive messages in real time so that I can have fluid conversations.
As a user, I want to scroll through message history smoothly so that I can catch up on past conversations.
As a mobile user, I want the chat page to be usable on a small screen so that I can chat on my phone.
As a user, I want AI responses to stream incrementally with markdown formatting so that I can read them as they arrive.
As a user, I want to reply to specific messages in a thread so that side conversations stay organized.
As a user, I want to search past messages quickly so that I can find important information.
As a user, I want to switch between dark and light themes so that the app is comfortable in any lighting.

non_functional_requirements.browser_support: Latest 2 versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge
non_functional_requirements.i18n: UI strings externalized for Simplified Chinese and English

assumptions: Users have modern browsers supporting WebSocket and SSE.
Demo deployment runs on a single VPS or local Docker Compose.
AI response endpoint is available as a mock or third-party SSE provider.

change_control.amendment_process: Any scope change after L2_REVIEW requires a formal amendment and re-lock with a new hash.
